series_metadata.series_description: The BWC Board of Directors Correspondence includes correspondence (electronic form letters) from the public, companies, and organizations concerning issues. The form letters from the public may state an opinion for or against a particular vote. The general correspondence (electronic form letters) from the Board of Directors includes responses to inquiries and other communication with the public.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 1 year in the I drive in the Board of Directors folder, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
